name: US ENERGY CORP
summary: US Energy Corp (USEG) is an energy company engaged in the exploration, development, and production of industrial gas, oil, and natural gas. The company pursues drilling programs with industry partners, seeks acquisition opportunities in oil and natural gas properties, and is working toward becoming an operator of industrial gas, oil, and natural gas properties.

products.name: Industrial Gas
products.description: Exploration and production of industrial gas from operated and non-operated properties.

products.name: Oil
products.description: Exploration, development, and production of crude oil through partnerships and drilling programs.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Exploration, development, and production of natural gas through industry partner drilling programs.

partnerships.description: Drilling programs with industry partners involving working and net revenue interests and payout-based milestone agreements.
